word: G4839 - συμπαραμένω - symparaménō - soom-par-am-en'-o - Continue with

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συμπαραμένω

- Transliteration: Sumparameno

- Phonetic: soom-par-am-en'-o

- Definition:

1. to abide together with

2. to continue to live together

- Origin: from G4862 and G3887

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G3887; to remain in company that is still live: - continue with.
